name: 图片批量压缩
description: 批量压缩目录内的图片（JPG/PNG），减小文件体积，保持视觉效果。

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: 压缩后输出目录（默认创建 compressed 子目录）

steps.name: 安装 Pillow
steps.command: pip install Pillow -q && echo 'Pillow 已就绪'

steps.name: 批量压缩图片
steps.description: 遍历目录压缩所有 JPG/PNG
steps.command:
python3 << 'EOF'
import os
from PIL import Image
input_dir = '$input_dir'
output_dir = '$output_dir'
quality = $quality
count = 0
total_saved = 0
for fname in os.listdir(input_dir):
    if fname.lower().endswith(('.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png')):
        src = os.path.join(input_dir, fname)
        dst = os.path.join(output_dir, fname)
        orig_size = os.path.getsize(src)
        img = Image.open(src)
        if fname.lower().endswith('.png'):
            img.save(dst, 'PNG', optimize=True)
        else:
            img.save(dst, 'JPEG', quality=quality, optimize=True)
        new_size = os.path.getsize(dst)
        saved = orig_size - new_size
        total_saved += saved
        count += 1
        print(f'{fname}: {orig_size//1024}KB → {new_size//1024}KB (节省 {saved//1024}KB)')
print(f'\n总计压缩 {count} 张，节省 {total_saved//1024}KB')
EOF
